hero.desc: I build complete applications end to end. Currently developing a manga platform with support for independent creators.

project.desc: Platform to read and manage manga, manhwa and comics. With authentication, personal library and support for indie creator content.

cs.problemText: Existing platforms make it hard for indie creators to publish, and don't offer an optimized mobile reading experience.
cs.solutionText: Mobile app with auth, customizable library, configurable reader and support for official and indie content.
cs.techText: Supabase for auth, DB and storage. Zustand for global state. Local persistence for offline CBZ reading.
cs.challengesText: Offline reading with CBZ, efficient image rendering and cross-device progress sync.
cs.resultText: Functional app with complete user system, online/offline reading and scalable architecture for creators.

about.title: About me
about.text: I'm a junior full stack developer focused on mobile. I'm interested in building real products, thinking about both user experience and backend infrastructure. I learn by building concrete things.
